The image of the idyllic island from afar is breathtakingly beautiful. The sun is setting in the background, painting the sky in shades of orange, pink and purple. The sea is a mesmerizing shade of blue, with gentle waves that lap against the shore. The sandy beach is pristine and stretches out for miles. The palm trees sway in the breeze, casting long shadows on the sand. In the distance, you can see a few sailboats bobbing up and down on the water. Seagulls and other birds fly around, adding to the sense of tranquility and freedom. This image is truly a sight to behold, and it captures the essence of paradise perfectly for a wall art.

Design a captivating landscape illustration that showcases a vast, aweinspiring scenery filled with natural beauty and a harmonious color palette. The composition should feature a sweeping vista that combines elements of majestic mountains, rolling hills, a meandering river, and a lush, verdant forest. Include a dramatic sky filled with soft, billowing clouds that catch the warm hues of a golden sunrise or a serene sunset. Use a combination of cool and warm colors, such as blues, greens, oranges, and yellows, to create depth and visual interest, guiding the viewers eye through the vast expanse of the scene. Incorporate subtle details like wildlife, blooming flowers, or distant structures to add a sense of scale and wonder. The final illustration should evoke a sense of tranquility and inspire a feeling of connection to the natural world.

A stunning par5 golf hole in the style of Shinnecock Hills Golf Club but located along the coastline of Portsea back beach in Victoria, Australia. The fairway is draped over the dunes at the very edge of the clifftop. Ground level shot from behind the tee. Make sure the putting green is large and undulating, the fairways are very wide, and each green has one pin with a classic white flag. Shot during golden hour on hassleblad 80mm lens f 1.8 on kodak portra 400

Create an ultrarealistic image of ultra modern terraced villa nestled amidst a lush green hill, overlooking a serene lake in the valley below. The backdrop features majestic mountains on the left, and a clear blue sky overhead. The image exudes a sense of spring vibes, with fresh foliage and blossoms dotting the woods surrounding the villa. The villa is seen from behind, showcasing the multiple terraces and balconies that provide stunning views of the surroundings. The house is positioned on the right side of the image, seamlessly blending into the natural landscape with its mixed nature elements. Perspektive behind the villa on top of the hill.

The background of the image is a wide blue sky, with a few scattered white clouds here and there. In the center of the image, a majestic and mighty tree with thick and deep roots stands against the sky. The tree is in autumn, with warmcolored leaves such as red, orange, and yellow covering its branches. A gentle breeze moves the leaves delicately, creating an effect of movement and life. Around the tree, there is a bright green meadow dotted with wildflowers in various colors, such as pink, purple, and white. In the distance, a rounded green hill can be seen, creating an effect of depth and vastness. The image is bright and welcoming, with a sense of serenity and natural beauty.
